summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now acknowledges Loid's pending follow-up before prioritizing Damian, and the closing lands more cleanly on Anya respecting Damian's request for unobserved space.
edits: Adjusted the opening paragraph to bridge more directly from Chapter 15's unresolved Loid aftermath while preserving the same narrative facts and urgency toward Damian.
Trimmed the closing movement and retuned the last line so the handoff emphasizes Anya choosing not to probe Damian's thoughts, avoiding an over-close echo of the previous chapter's no-contact ending.
